testcase.name: tests.test_payment_methods
testcase.error: backend/tests/test_payment_methods.py:15: in <module> BASE_URL = os.environ.get('REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL').rstrip('/') ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'NoneType' object has no attribute 'rstrip'
